# PuTextarea

## Intent

- textarea
- multi-line field
- long text input

## Prefer When

- Use for multi-line text entry.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for single-line fields; use PuInput.

## Import

```ts
import { PuTextarea } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```
